title: Spring Planting Guide 2026 — What to Sow and When
author: Elena Papadopoulos
excerpt: As soil temperatures rise across the Mediterranean, farmers are facing a pivotal window. Here's what agronomists are recommending for this season.

title: Olive Oil Prices Climb as Mediterranean Harvests Fall Short
author: Marco Ferretti
excerpt: A second consecutive difficult harvest season has pushed extra virgin olive oil prices to record highs. Producers are adapting — but consumers are feeling the squeeze.

title: The Bees Are Back — And Farmers Are Paying Attention
author: Sofia Andreou
excerpt: Pollinator populations are showing signs of partial recovery in several European regions. Regenerative farming practices may be playing a bigger role than previously thought.

title: Europe's New Shield for Farmers — How the Mercosur Safeguard Works
author: Your Name
excerpt: The EU has quietly published a regulation that could prove decisive for European farmers as the Mercosur trade deal takes effect. Here's what it does and why it matters.
